title: Library
description: User-curated external links (LIB-01, D-13). 6th State data file. CRUD only — no AI write payload.

links.description: User-curated external links the bar owner has bookmarked.

url.description: External link URL. Only http(s) URLs are rendered as anchors; other schemes display as escaped plain text.

title.description: Display title (falls back to the URL if absent).
